vibe: Apple-like minimalistic, clean, premium, spacious, professional

rules.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tighter font-medium text-slate-900
rules.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight font-medium text-slate-900

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous spacing. Use p-8, p-12, p-16 to give products breathing room.
spacing_and_layout.bento_grid: For Homepage Category Highlights, use an asymmetric 12-col grid. Hero spans 8 cols, secondary spans 4 cols.
spacing_and_layout.product_grid: Grid cols 1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4. Gap-6 or gap-8.

components.buttons: Rounded-full for primary actions. px-6 py-3. Solid black or accent blue. Hover: scale slightly or translate-y-[-1px]. shadow-sm.
components.cards: Cardless or very subtle rounded-2xl with bg-[#f5f5f7] and no border. On hover, add a soft shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.08)].
components.header: Crystal Glassmorphism. sticky top-0 z-50. bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-[#d2d2d7]/50. Must contain search bar.
components.inputs: Rounded-xl, bg-[#f5f5f7], border-transparent focus:bg-white focus:border-[#2997ff] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#2997ff] transition-all.
components.badges: Rounded-full px-3 py-1 bg-black text-white text-xs font-medium.

homepage.hero: High-impact, product-focused. Minimal text. Use generated hero_laptop image with no overlay, placed on a very light gray background.
homepage.category_highlights: Bento grid with large images of Laptops, Desktop PCs, Gamer PCs, Componentes.

product_catalog.filters: Sidebar or top horizontal sticky bar. Clean toggles (Shadcn switch/checkbox).
product_catalog.sorting: Sort by: Más comprado, Mejor calificado, Precio bajo a alto, Precio alto a bajo, Peor calificado.
product_catalog.live_search: Command menu (ctrl+k style) or expansive search bar in header that overlays results.

product_detail.layout: Sticky product details on right, scrolling image gallery on left.
product_detail.reviews: Clean list, stars in black or accent color, user avatars.
product_detail.add_to_cart: Sticky bottom bar on mobile, prominent sticky button on desktop.

cart_checkout.style: Slide-out sheet for cart, dedicated minimal page for checkout (focus strictly on conversion, remove header nav).

motion_and_interactions.hover: Products in grid gently scale up (scale-105) and get a soft shadow. Use framer-motion layout animations for filtering.
motion_and_interactions.cart_sheet: Slide in from right, with backdrop blur.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a clean, Apple-like E-commerce platform in Spanish.
Include sample products for Laptops, PC de Escritorio, PC Gamer, Componentes.
Implement shopping cart and checkout flow using Context or simple state.
Implement User Auth (login/register) and profile page.
Implement Product details with Ratings and Reviews.
Implement search bar in header with live-filtering.
Implement 'Componentes' section specifically with sorting controls: Más comprado, Mejor calificado, Precio bajo a alto, Precio alto a bajo, Peor calificado.
Use Shadcn UI customized for rounded-2xl or rounded-3xl corners on cards.
